_comment: ADR-019 relative session scoring + ADR-020 profile fit/opposition (schema v4). Band evaluation: priority descending, first band whose predicates ALL pass; exactly one fallback. minEfficiency/minBucketEfficiency are authored as fractions in [0,1] (loadData converts to integer percentage points: userTotal/ceilingTotal from computeSessionCeiling). W3 retune (sim n=500 seed=42 greedy+random): greedy total-eff compressed 96-100 (p50 99), so per-bucket efficiency (MID/ATT cascade 99->98->97->none) is the primary discriminator within the eff=98-99 majority. 10-0 requires near-perfect MID+ATT (99) AND WL>=86 — efficiency alone cannot let a star-XI-with-one-62 through. 7-1 shares WL>=86 with 10-0 but drops per-bucket (great total, strong floor, imperfect somewhere). 1-2 drops requireAllBucketsNonEmpty to catch structurally-broken-but-decent-eff drafts (empty GK, strong outfield). Six-gate protocol: greedy 10-0 6%, no band >40%, random top-3 0%, all bands >=1%, near-miss-10-0 11%, WL floor has teeth. ADR-020: `profiles` gives per-formation attr weights/targets for DEF/MID/ATT buckets (GK excluded — no attrs); `oppositions` is the rotating daily-opponent catalog (weightMods multiply profile weights before fit is computed). `minFit` now GATES the top three bands (10-0=94, 7-1=89, 5-0=89) alongside a tightened efficiency ladder (10-0 minEfficiency 0.99, 7-1 0.99, 5-0 0.985) — P040 fit-teeth calibration (2026-07-14, canary-justified: 10-0 stayed trivial for humans at minFit=0/minEff=0.99 auto-cleared by best-OVR-per-bucket play). The 10-0 gate is FIT-DOMINANT (user pick 2026-07-14): efficiency held at 0.99 and minFit=94 carries the teeth, rather than the perfect-efficiency path (minEff 0.995⇒eff==100 + minFit 92) — fit-dominant avoids perfect-efficiency reveal path-luck. D5's parked minFit=0 (info-only) is superseded: the D5 conclusion that fit can't separate the BOTS still holds, but a HUMAN reads the opponent without the fitaware bot's fixed ΔOVR tax, so fit can carry weight for humans it couldn't for the sim. fitaware-neutral 10-0 dropped 6.2%→2.6% (seeds 42/1000/5000: 2.6/1.8/1.6), Law cycle PASS (every archetype >0), no dead bands. STARTING calibration pending human playtest validation — see RISKS R-13 D6 experiment log.

formations.description: Balanced classic — four defenders, three midfielders, three forwards
Traditional English — two strikers, flat four midfield
Attack-minded — three at the back, packed midfield
Defensive solidity — five defenders, counter-attacking outlets

4-3-3._comment: D4 final (R-13 bite-point) — binding attrs high-weighted so attr-aware picks separate from attr-blind: DEF pace + accuracy (RB/LB specialists), MID strength (DM enforcers), ATT accuracy (winger craft). Targets raised on binding axes to the bite point. Weights/targets kept as-authored (P040 fit-teeth changed band gate numbers only — see thresholds top-level _comment and RISKS R-13); fit now gates the top three bands (minFit 94/89/89).

4-4-2._comment: balanced — no bucket leans hard on one axis.

3-5-2._comment: mid-accuracy-heavy — five in the middle, so MID accuracy dominates the shape.

5-3-2._comment: DEF-strength / ST-pace — five at the back need bulk, the two forwards live off the counter.

oppositions.label: THE PRESSING MACHINE
oppositions.tagline: Full-throttle press for ninety minutes — pace is at a premium today.

oppositions.label: THE LOW BLOCK
oppositions.tagline: Ten behind the ball, daring you to pick the lock — accuracy is at a premium today.

oppositions.label: AERIAL BOMBARDMENT
oppositions.tagline: Long balls and a giant at both boxes — strength is at a premium today.

oppositions.label: COUNTER KINGS
oppositions.tagline: Sit deep, break at speed, finish with a shoulder — pace and strength share the premium today.

oppositions.label: THE POSSESSION CULT
oppositions.tagline: A thousand passes before they even think about goal — accuracy is at a serious premium today.

oppositions.label: NEUTRAL
oppositions.tagline: No particular gameplan to read into — a fair fight today.
